summary: Saturday — no scheduled meetings. Yesterday's Exec Team Meeting (Apr 24) generated 19 action items across Carnival UK insurance, J-1 program expansion, and Indonesian office buildout. Inbound from Defeng Shipping (Indonesia) on crew supply. Carnival UK contract meeting postponed by one week pending insurance status. CRM J-1 module returned empty payload — known issue.
